pricing.source: Official booking pages, shop websites, shop social price posts, and targeted BrightData MCP checks
pricing.primaryBasis: standalone male haircut price where publicly listed; promotional or cash prices are labeled in the service name/note
pricing.note: Rows without a shop-specific standalone male haircut price were removed after a second BrightData MCP search pass. Additional BA shops added only when Maps rating/review thresholds and ARS 30,000+ haircut prices were verified.
